name: search
description: Pagefind search widget embedded via ```search code fences. Theme layouts must emit a hidden span with 'ID: {slug}' text so the visualizer can render the slug as a styled pill in excerpts and result cards.

placeholder.description: Search input placeholder text (shorthand for translations.placeholder)

showImages.description: Show page thumbnail images in results

showEmptyFilters.description: Show filter categories even when empty

openFilters.description: Filter categories to show expanded by default
